---
--- title: "10BData607" author: "XiaoFei" format: html editor: visual ---
---

## Approach

This task is to use JSON data to investigate and answer four interesting, data-driven questions. First will need to establish connection to Nobel Prize organization's public APIs to access structured Nobel Prize data.

The task requires questions should go beyond simple counts. I'll come up with questions requires filtering, joining or comparing fields.

I'm interesting to investigate Nobel Prizes and gender distribution, or age distribution including if there is any trend to show ages increased over time or the other way around.
